repair_candidate.summary: Repair contributor PR #93549 on its existing editable branch after confirming current main still retains the cron agent watchdog for valid execution-phase signals. Keep the patch constrained to watchdog phase recognition and minimal regression coverage.
repair_candidate.pr_title: fix(cron): keep watchdog alive for valid agent phase signals
repair_candidate.pr_body:
## Summary
- Repair #93549 on the contributor branch so valid cron agent phase signals clear or retain the pre-execution watchdog as intended.
- Keep the change limited to `src/cron/service/agent-watchdog.ts` and focused timer regression coverage.
- Preserve credit for @lzyyzznl and source PR https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/93549.

## Verification
- `pnpm check:changed`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/cron/service/timer.regression.test.ts`
- Codex `/review` after repair
credit_notes: Preserve source PR credit for https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/93549 by @lzyyzznl.
Mention #93530 as the reported issue in the PR body or commit metadata if a replacement PR is later required.
Do not close or supersede #93535 or #93561 in this job; close actions are blocked.
